languages.original_text: "Mmm... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

languages.text: "Ммм... некоторые из этих приборов могут извлечь немало страданий из тех, кого с их помощью... как вы это называете... "врачуют"? Занятное место".
"Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."
languages.original_text: "Ммм... некоторые из этих приборов могут извлечь немало страданий из тех, кого с их помощью... как вы это называете... "врачуют"? Занятное место".

traits.locale_text: "Mmm... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."
"Mmm... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."
"Mmm... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

languages.text: 「うーん…この装置の中には、それを使う人から相当な苦しみを引き出すことができるものもある。それを…どう呼ぶんだっけ…『治療』に使う人から。興味深い場所だね」
languages.original_text: "Mmm... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…この装置の中には、それを使う人から相当な苦しみを引き出すことができるものもある。それを…どう呼ぶんだっけ…『治療』に使う人から。興味深い場所だね。」

languages.text: « Aaahh... Certains de ces appareils pourraient extraire une bonne dose de souffrance de ceux qui s'en servent pour... "soigner", comme vous le dites. Voilà un endroit réellement fascinant. »
languages.original_text: "Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

traits.locale_text: « Aaahh... Certains de ces appareils pourraient extraire une bonne dose de souffrance de ceux qui s'en servent pour... "soigner", comme vous le dites. Voilà un endroit réellement fascinant. »

languages.text: "Ahhh ... Einige dieser Geräte könnten beträchtliches Leid verursachen, wenn man sie ... wie nennt Ihr es ... zum 'Vergnügen' benutzt. Ein faszinierender Ort."
languages.original_text: "Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

traits.locale_text: "Ahhh ... Einige dieser Geräte könnten beträchtliches Leid verursachen, wenn man sie ... wie nennt Ihr es ... zum 'Vergnügen' benutzt. Ein faszinierender Ort."

languages.text: "Aa... Bu cihazların bazıları, onları... Nasıl diyorsunuz... 'Tedavi' etmek için kullananlardan epey acı çıkarabilir mi? Büyüleyici bir yer."
languages.original_text: "Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

traits.locale_text: "Aa... Bu cihazların bazıları, onları... Nasıl diyorsunuz... 'Tedavi' etmek için kullananlardan epey acı çıkarabilir mi? Büyüleyici bir yer."

languages.text: «Ah... Algunos de estos aparatos podrían causar un sufrimiento delicioso a quienes los usen para... ¿cómo lo llamáis vosotros? ¿"Tratar heridas"? Este lugar es fascinante».
languages.original_text: "Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

traits.locale_text: «Ah... Algunos de estos aparatos podrían causar un sufrimiento delicioso a quienes los usen para... ¿cómo lo llamáis vosotros? ¿"Tratar heridas"? Este lugar es fascinante».

languages.text: “啊……这些设备倒是能从使用者身上榨取不少痛苦。你们管这叫……‘治疗’？这地方可真有意思。”
languages.original_text: "Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."

traits.locale_text: “啊……这些设备倒是能从使用者身上榨取不少痛苦。你们管这叫……‘治疗’？这地方可真有意思。”
